title: Mastering Section 43B(h) MSME Statutory Compliance & Audit Readiness
description: An expert-led technical session analyzing the impact of Section 43B(h) on MSME creditor payments, disallowance provisions, vendor classification strategies, and audit documentation.
speaker: CA Puneet Gupta
speakerDesignation: Proprietor & Principal CA, Anil Puneet and Associates
keyTakeaways: Understanding the 15-day and 45-day statutory payment timelines
Identifying Micro vs Small Enterprise classification under Udyam
Impact of disallowances on annual income tax computation and cash flow
Practical accounting ledgers setup and vendor audit workflows

title: GST E-Invoicing & GSTR-2B Automated ITC Reconciliation Masterclass
description: A comprehensive practical webinar on Rule 48(4) e-invoicing workflows, IRN validation, handling DRC-01C mismatch notices, and optimizing monthly input tax credit.
speaker: CA Puneet Gupta
speakerDesignation: Proprietor & Principal CA, Anil Puneet and Associates
keyTakeaways: Rule 48(4) E-invoicing applicability for businesses above ₹5 Crore turnover
Automated matching of purchase registers with GSTR-2B portal statements
Resolving DRC-01C system notices within statutory 7-day deadlines
